Container.Name: photo-culling-assistant
Container.Overview: Matches RAW assets from one Immich account to final images from another, lets you review uncertain matches, and applies decision tags through the Immich API. It never moves or deletes media files.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Persistent app data: saved reviews, history, and tag plans.

Config.Name: Immich URL
Config.Description: Immich server URL reachable from this container.

Config.Name: RAW Immich API Key
Config.Description: API key for the Immich account that owns the RAW assets.

Config.Name: Final Immich API Key
Config.Description: API key for the Immich account that owns the final images.

Config.Name: RAW User ID
Config.Description: Immich user ID that owns the RAW assets.

Config.Name: Final User ID
Config.Description: Immich user ID that owns the final images.

Config.Name: App Access Token
Config.Description: Optional shared token for web UI/API access. Strongly recommended on a LAN.

Config.Name: Keeper Tag
Config.Description: Tag for RAW assets that have accepted final-image matches.

Config.Name: Unused RAW Tag
Config.Description: Tag for RAW assets without accepted final-image matches.

Config.Name: RAW Found Final Tag
Config.Description: Tag for final images with accepted RAW matches.

Config.Name: No RAW Final Tag
Config.Description: Tag for final images with no RAW match.

Config.Name: Duplicate Final Tag
Config.Description: Tag for lower-file-size duplicate final images.

Config.Name: Immich page size
Config.Description: Assets read per Immich API page.

Config.Name: Maximum Immich pages
Config.Description: Safety limit for Immich API pagination.
